name: Notion source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for Notion: pulls pages from the configured database as Symphony tasks, and pushes terminal task status back to the page's status property (completed/failed). Reads its token + database id from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree Notion connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_notion).
